dialog.title: Create new Space
dialog.subtitle: Set up a new top-level Space in your account.
dialog.subtitleForAccount: Set up a new top-level Space in the {{account}} account.

template.label: Template
template.hint: Optional — pick a Space template to pre-fill structure and content.

overwriteConfirm.title: Replace form contents?
overwriteConfirm.description: Applying this template will overwrite the name, tagline, description and tags you've already entered.

template.invalidFlow: This template can't be used to create a Space — it needs a 4-phase innovation flow.

displayName.label: Name
displayName.hint: The name of your Space, visible to everyone.

slug.label: URL
slug.hint: The web address for your Space. Auto-filled from the name — you can edit it.

tagline.label: Tagline
tagline.hint: A short subtitle describing the Space.

description.label: Description
description.hint: Explain what this Space is about. Markdown supported.

tags.label: Tags
tags.hint: Tags help people find this Space.
tags.placeholder: Add a tag and press Enter

visuals.tooSmall: Image is too small. Minimum {{width}} × {{height}} px required.

addTutorials.label: Add Tutorials and example posts to this Space

terms.checkboxLabel: I accept the <terms>terms and conditions</terms> for creating a Space.
terms.dialogTitle: Terms and Conditions for creating a Space
terms.dialogContent: I understand that as a Host, I am responsible for all content within the Space.
terms.fullTermsLink: Click here to read more about the Terms & Conditions.

license.noPlans: No Available Plans. Please, contact support.

validation.slugInvalid: Use only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens
validation.acceptedTerms: You must accept the terms to create a Space

crop.title: Crop image
crop.description: Adjust the crop to frame your image.
